text:
OUD_ANY_MEDICARE_EVER Overarching OUD Disorder (Any of the Three Sub-Indicators) First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicare Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_DX_COMBINED Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for OUD - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 OUD_DX_MEDICAID Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for OUD - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3
